creator: lifanov@freebsd.org
text:
Hmm, I was able to do a clean install of dotnet30 (which pulls in dotnet20).
Can you give me a bit more detail please?

What's the version of Winetricks you are running, which version and architecture of FreeBSD are you running on, which Wine port are you using (i386-wine, i386-wine-staging, etc.), and, if possible, what is the command or a sequence of steps in the graphical UI to produce the failure?
